sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَ جَابِرٌ أَنَّ حَلِيبَ الطَّاوِلَةِ اخْتَفَى.
sentences.translation: Jabir je primijetio da je mlijeko sa stola nestalo.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir noticed that the milk on the table had disappeared.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَشْرَبْهُ هُوَ وَلَا أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ni on ni niko iz porodice ga nije pio.
sentences.translationEn: Neither he nor anyone in the family had drunk it.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ إِلَى الْنَّافِذَةِ الْمَفْتُوحَةِ وَرَأَى الْقِطَّةَ تَبْتَعِدُ.
sentences.translation: Pogledao je prema otvorenom prozoru i vidio mačku kako se udaljava.
sentences.translationEn: He looked at the open window and saw the cat moving away.

sentences.translation: Jabir je shvatio šta se desilo i nasmijao se.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir understood what had happened and laughed.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يُغْلِقَ النَّافِذَةَ حِينَ يَضَعُ الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je zatvoriti prozor kada odloži hranu.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to close the window when he put out food.
